problem.title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock Ii

approaches.title: Sum positive day-to-day price increases
approaches.summary: Iterate over adjacent price pairs and add each positive increase, which is equivalent to taking every profitable transaction in the unlimited-transactions stock

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Introduced an imperative sliding-window loop that accumulates each positive adjacent price difference.
Refactored the same adjacent-difference strategy into a concise iterator pipeline using windows, map, and sum.
